expectations.evidence: Output uses the exact SEO-01~SEO-11 and WP-01~WP-18 item codes from the guide, with matching priority levels and item descriptions (e.g. 'noindex 없음', 'title 태그 존재하고 고유'), indicating the guide was read and followed.
SEO-02 flags title as too short (11 chars, recommends 50-60). SEO-05 flags missing meta description. SEO-06 flags missing canonical URL. All three meta tag categories are explicitly checked.
SEO-03 explicitly checks h1 count: 'index.html: <h1> 1개 존재. dashboard.tsx: <h1> 1개 존재. 정상.' marked as pass.

expectations.text: References SEO item IDs (SEO-01~11) in findings
expectations.evidence: All 11 SEO items (SEO-01 through SEO-11) are listed in the Technical SEO table with their codes, and the fix guide references them by code (e.g. 'SEO-02: title 태그 개선', 'SEO-05: meta description 추가').

expectations.text: Provides fix recommendations for identified issues
expectations.evidence: Detailed fix guide section covers SEO-02, SEO-05, SEO-06, SEO-07, WP-01, WP-02, WP-03, WP-04, WP-05, WP-06, WP-09, WP-10, WP-11, WP-18 with specific code examples and explanations.
